publishedAbstract: - `RHACM`, `MCE` and `monitoring` plugins are in `Failed` state.- `Observe` Tab not visible in RHOCP console `Administrator` view. ~~~ Failed to get a valid plugin manifest from /api/plugins/monitoring-plugin/ SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input ~~~![Error](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/attachments/capture_0.jpg)
publishedTitle: Plugins are not getting loaded in web console fails with Unexpected end of JSON input for RHOCP4
